stemHtml: The flight crew is suddenly subjected to unlawful interference by two hijackers while flying from Cairo to Larnaca. Without anyone noticing, the commander sets the transponder Mode A Code 7500. Is this action correct?

options.a: No, the correct code would be Mode C Code 7500.
options.b: No, the correct code would be Mode C Code 7700.
options.c: No, the correct code would be Mode C Code 7600.
